content.question: What are the causal pathways by which the 2013 centralization of services (KLIK reorganization) shifted time allocation toward assessment and away from therapy, and could this shift be reversed through organizational redesign without raising total staffing?
content.reduction_path: Qualitative audit of management and workload data from a stratified sample of pedagógiai szakszolgálat centers (by size and regional placement), supplemented by interviews with senior staff about resource-allocation mechanisms and any documented workflow redesigns attempted since 2013; analysis to identify which aspects are structural/irreversible vs. design-contingent.
